children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General may promulgate reasonable and necessary regulations to implement this part.

children.heading: Sliding scale
children.label: b Sliding scale
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Attorney General shall issue regulations regarding the use of a sliding scale based on financial need to ensure that an eligible person who is in financial need receives priority in receiving funds under this part.section 10303(b) of this title
